channel.title: Global Trend Map — World Trending Topics
channel.description: Real-time global trend analysis across 40+ countries. Hourly updates.

item.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day Trailer Breaks Every Record in Cinema History
item.description: The official trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day shattered all previous records, becoming the first film trailer ever to surpass 1 billion views in just four days. Released March 17, 2026, the Sony Pictures reveal sent 36 countries into a search frenzy — and the data tells a story no one expected.

item.title: Dune: Part Three Teaser Drops and the Internet Loses Its Mind
item.description: The official teaser trailer for Dune: Part Three landed on March 17, 2026, sending 25M+ search queries across 36 countries into overdrive. Denis Villeneuve's trilogy closer promises a darker, more action-packed finale.

item.title: BTS 'Body to Body': The Song That Has 11 Countries Searching Right Now
item.description: BTS's high-energy comeback track 'Body to Body' is dominating global search trends across 11 countries with 15M+ searches. A Netflix documentary drops in three days. A world tour starts in two weeks. ARMY is just warming up.

item.title: Why Is BTS 'SWIM' Official MV Trending Globally? The Comeback That Shook the World
item.description: BTS returned with 'SWIM' — the lead single off their 5th studio album ARIRANG — marking the group's first full comeback after military service. With 36M+ views in 24 hours across 12 countries, here's why the world is searching for it.
